examples: He could inspire all feelings expressed in hymns. With his gold lyre and his sweet voice, he led the choir of the Muses.
Nero did have a musical gift and could play the lyre or the cithara.
Make me thy lyre, even as the forest is.
Archaeologists said it was likely to be part of the bridge of a lyre dating to more than 2, 300 years ago.
In Phyfe's lyre-back chairs, the lyre features a key-ended tuning pin on the right side and a peg-shaped end on the left, suggesting an authentic musical instrument rather than a mere design motif.
